common.name: Name
common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this?

login.title: Log in to AccessFlow
login.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

validation.passwordWeak: Password must be at least 8 characters and include an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, and a number.

dashboard.noRoles: You have no roles assigned yet. An administrator needs to grant you access.

users.title: Users
users.deleteConfirm: Delete this user? This immediately revokes all of their sessions.

roles.title: Roles
roles.deleteConfirm: Delete this role? It will be removed from every user who has it.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.deleteConfirm: Delete this permission? It will be removed from every role that has it.

simulator.title: Permission Simulator
simulator.description: Check whether a real user, or a hypothetical set of roles, would be granted a given permission — without actually granting anything.
simulator.notGrantedByAny: Not granted by any of the selected roles.
simulator.userInactiveWarning: This user is deactivated. The roles shown are their assignments, but their effective access is currently zero.

policies.title: Policies
policies.description: Attribute-based access rules that sit alongside roles and permissions — e.g. "any user may view their own profile," or "no one may delete their own account." An allow policy grants access even without the matching permission; a deny policy always wins over any allow.
policies.conditionsHint: All conditions must hold for this policy to apply. Compare an attribute (e.g. resource.id) to another attribute (e.g. subject.id) or a literal value.
policies.conditionsRequired: Every condition needs an attribute and a value to compare it to.
policies.deleteConfirm: Delete this policy? Access decisions relying on it will fall back to ordinary role/permission checks.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.notFoundBody: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved.
errors.network: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
